page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance provides 96 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 96 physical cores, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring no resource sharing at the CPU level.

Memory capacity is a key feature of this instance, delivering 768.0 GB of RAM, which equates to a resource density of 8.0 GB per core. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high memory-to-core ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require consistent compute performance without hyperthreading overhead. Suitable workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-based server allocates one thread per physical core to ensure dedicated compute performance. The instance lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. With a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, it is structured for memory-intensive enterprise applications. This hardware profile is well-suited for in-memory databases, large-scale data processing, and memory-bound enterprise workloads requiring predictable, non-shared CPU resources.

tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring ninety-six physical Intel Xeon cores and seven hundred sixty-eight gigabytes of RAM.
